$comment: Preset for sdlc-spec-compliance-auditor. Stage 1 (Inception & Requirements). Verifies spec docs have FR-IDs, quantified NFRs, scope boundaries, acceptance criteria, and personas.

sub_agent.description: Audits docs/spec.md for the five framework-required properties.

gate_contribution.rationale: Stage 1 cannot pass without a compliant spec. This preset is the primary gate check.
